steps.title: Translate the first condition
steps.content: "Connor has 4 times as many dollars as Maria" means Connor's amount equals 4 times Maria's: $c = 4m$.

steps.title: Translate the second condition
steps.content: "Together they have a total of \$25.00" means $c + m = 25$.

steps.title: Eliminate choices
steps.content:
• "$c=4m$ $c+m=25$": Matches both translations exactly. ✓
  • "$m=4c$ $c+m=25$": $m=4c$ would mean Maria has 4 times Connor's amount, reversing the relationship. ✗
  • "$c=25m$ $c+m=4$": Swaps the roles of 4 and 25; total would be 4 dollars, not 25 dollars. ✗
  • "$m=25c$ $c+m=4$": Both equations are wrong — wrong multiplier and wrong total. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
